title: City Announces Speed Camera Locations for Summer School Enforcement
summary: Syracuse announces 19 school locations where speed enforcement cameras will operate during summer 2026 school sessions (7am-6pm weekdays). The School Zone Traffic Enforcement program has demonstrated significant impact: daily violations declined 55% (1,275 to 575 per camera) and dangerous speeding (31+ mph over limit) decreased 46% from November-April. Mayor Owens emphasizes camera effectiveness for student safety.

political_signal.description: Mayor-led announcement of ongoing safety initiative with quantified performance data demonstrates executive commitment to Vision Zero and data-driven public safety decision-making. Emphasis on student protection aligns with constituent welfare priorities.

processing_notes: Author listed as Unknown; press release from Mayor's Office based on content and URL structure
No budget or procurement data provided; this is an operational announcement for existing program
19 school locations listed; some cameras serve multiple schools in proximity
Strong data attribution (Nov-Apr metrics) supports evidence-based policy communication
Contact: press@syr.gov for media inquiries; program info: syr.gov/SZTE
Potential duplicate of CTX-WEB-2026-00153 — linked for review
